It dropped down from its $389 full price to $339 back at the top of March and held out at that price through the Big Spring Sale in the last week of March. It carries a $1,000 MSRP direct from the brand, but we’ve been more often seeing it stay between $600 and $700 outside of major sales. We last saw this model getting a flash sale to $550 at the top of March, but you’re getting even more savings and the best price ever with this deal while it lasts. Until April 11, you’ll be able to pick one up with $200 slashed from the going rate (and $500 off the MSRP) for a new all-time low.
